rationale: The user 'user-01$' (a machine account) is accessing both IPC$ and SYSVOL shares from the same IP address (fe80::655e:8688:355e:91f1) on host-01.corp.local. While machine accounts accessing these shares can be normal for domain operations, the rapid succession of access to multiple gpt.ini files within SYSVOL (EV-002, EV-003) after initial IPC$ access (A0) is unusual and warrants further investigation.
